     the Fermi energy is    -0.4591 ev

!    total energy              =  -11771.86414527 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.2E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08769549 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11771.77644978 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -238412.83943779 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120308.20098596 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4211.06165209 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110546.93721970 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.01356556 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.00 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    53.65 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  33 iterations
